schema.description: Look up the failure history of a specific test by its identifier. Returns recent failure events, error messages, and stack traces. Use when the user mentions a specific test name or when triaging a single failing test.
schema.name: test_failure_lookup

limit.description: Maximum number of failure events to return.

test_id.description: Test identifier in 'classname::name' or 'file_path::name' format. FTS-style queries also accepted (e.g. 'test_login AND oauth').
